policies.code_of_conduct: All workers are recruited locally. No fees; passports remain with the worker. Hours 44/week; overtime is voluntary capped at 12/week.
policies.anti_bribery: ISO 37001 certified. Annual training. Facilitation payments are prohibited.

code_bundle.app.py:
import os
from flask import Flask, request, jsonify
from flask_login import login_required
from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash
import psycopg2
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = os.environ['FLASK_SECRET']

@app.route('/api/users', methods=['POST'])
@login_required
def create_user():
    conn = psycopg2.connect(dsn=os.environ['DATABASE_URL'])
    cur = conn.cursor()
    cur.execute('INSERT INTO users (email, pw_hash) VALUES (%s, %s)', (request.json['email'], generate_password_hash(request.json['password'])))
    conn.commit()
    return jsonify({'status':'created'}), 201

sections.indemnity: Each party agrees to indemnify the other for direct damages, subject to the cap on liability in Section 5.
sections.liability_cap: EXCEPT FOR breach of confidentiality, IP infringement, gross negligence, willful misconduct, and indemnification, each party's aggregate liability shall not exceed 12 months of fees.
sections.ip: Vendor assigns deliverables; retains pre-existing IP and grants Customer a perpetual royalty-free license.
sections.data_protection: GDPR Art. 28-compliant Data Processing Addendum at Schedule B applies.
sections.audit: Customer may, upon 30 days notice, audit Vendor's compliance with security controls once per year.
sections.compliance: Each party warrants compliance with the UK Bribery Act 2010, US FCPA, OECD Anti-Bribery Convention, and OFAC sanctions.
sections.termination: Either party may terminate for convenience upon 90 days written notice. Customer shall pay for Services performed.
sections.assignment: Neither party may assign without consent except in connection with merger/acquisition.
